title: Kaido Descends on Wano
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Kozuki Oden, Unknown person #12, Orochi as The truth of the Kozuki retainers and Wano’s time-displaced rebellion is revealed as Kaido’s power closes in.
scene: Kaido appears in dragon form and turns the Wano rebellion into an immediate confrontation.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: They're at the ruins of open castle!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...No, I lied so that he would stop his rampage.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...However, there have been rumours spreading around lately...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: about a suspicious light that was seen from the top of the mountain.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If that rumour is fanning the flames of Lord Orochi's fears...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Then the destruction of those ruins...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: will allow us to kill two birds with one stone....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Did you say they're at open castle....!? Hicc~

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How nostalgic... It's certainly a good place to hide.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So that's where they scurried off to... the ones that took away my smiles...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I won't let them get away with this...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's no way he'd notice from that distance....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: No... he's definitely coming this way!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It wasn't even close to enough to get him sober...

summary: This section advances the Wano Country - Kozuki Secret storyline with 32 dialogue beats. Kaido’s arrival turns the rebellion from a secret plan into a brutal confrontation.
